questions.question: Lifelong learning is no longer something that ends after graduation.
questions.explanation: The text states that learning is no longer something that ends after graduation, emphasizing the importance of lifelong learning.

questions.question: What is one of the biggest benefits of lifelong learning?
questions.explanation: The text highlights that one of the biggest benefits of lifelong learning is the ability to stay relevant in the workplace.

questions.question: Lifelong learning contributes to personal ______.
questions.explanation: The text mentions that lifelong learning contributes to personal development.
